Mon. April 13

Rethinking Global Business

2:35 – 2:55 PM
Atlas Stage · Grand A/B, 2nd Floor
Guests
Kristin Peck
CEO, Zoetis
Background
CEO and board member of Zoetis with 20+ years in life sciences. Led development of 18 blockbuster products. Named to TIME100 Health 2025. Formerly EVP at Pfizer. Holds degrees from Georgetown and Columbia Business School. Serves on boards of BlackRock, Mayo Clinic, and Business Roundtable.
Anne Wojcicki
Founder & CEO, 23andMe
Background
Founder and CEO of 23andMe, the pioneer in direct-to-consumer genetic testing with 15M+ customers. Former Yale biologist. Secured multiple FDA clearances for DTC genetic health reports. Named to Forbes 100 Most Powerful Women.
